hooks.prompt: The agent is about to run a git commit. Check: has the branch progress document in prd/branch commit updates/<branch-name>.md been updated in this session BEFORE this commit? The CLAUDE.md file requires prepending a new progress entry before every commit. If the progress file has NOT been updated yet, respond with {"decision": "block", "reason": "You must update the branch progress document in prd/branch commit updates/ before committing. See CLAUDE.md for the required entry format."}. If it HAS been updated, allow the commit.
